rules.rule: If bonds (HYG/LQD) are breaking down, reduce equity exposure immediately
rules.quote: If bonds freak out, everything breaks

rules.rule: Never trade against institutional dark pool flows above $1B at a price level
rules.quote: 5.86B right at the low

rules.rule: When SentimenTrader Smart Money < 0.3 AND Dumb Money > 0.7, shift to defensive
When AAII Bulls > 50%, treat as contrarian sell signal
Record retail demand (>$80B rolling 1m) OR concentrated positioning confirmed by JP Morgan/BarChart is a contrarian WARNING, not confirmation
rules.quote: Retail piling in = be suspicious. Concentrated positioning across markets is the meta risk.

rules.rule: Daily close below 20 MA = exit long positions
rules.quote: 20 MA is king

rules.rule: Weekly 20 MA is the mean reversion zone — most important weekly level
Yield curve un-inversion is MORE dangerous than inversion. Recessions start AFTER.
Financials breaking support = economy sickness. Canary in coal mine.
rules.quote: If we lose financials, sickness in economy

rules.rule: Don't chase. Missed move = find next opportunity. Abundance mindset.
rules.quote: Abundance mindset — don't chase trades, move to the next one

rules.rule: Put/Call ratio > 0.93 AND SPX > 10% below 52-week high = strong buy (100% win rate 6-12mo, n=25)
Track 6-month cycle: Tech Earnings + FOMC create rally windows on ES1!
Fear & Greed > 75 (Extreme Greed) = reduce exposure. < 25 (Extreme Fear) = opportunity.
Record FINRA margin debt with record negative net investor credit = bubble risk
rules.quote: 2025 AI Bubble annotation on his chart

rules.rule: Use forward P/E by sector for rotation. Don't assume tech = expensive — compare.
rules.quote: Technology is actually CHEAPER than many sectors on forward PE

rules.rule: If it's in the press, it's in the price. Consensus narrative = already priced.
rules.quote: If it's in the press, it's in the price

rules.rule: Options gamma walls: Put wall = support floor. Call wall = resistance ceiling. Break = acceleration.
Bloomberg Long/Short ETF AUM divergence = institutional positioning signal
Less trades = more wins. Less indicators = more clarity. Simple > complex.
Inverse Cramer is a legitimate signal. Track Jim Cramer's strong calls and fade them.
Concentrated retail positioning confirmed by institutional sources (JP Morgan, BarChart) = increase contrarian risk score, watch for unwind
rules.quote: Record retail buying + concentrated positioning = warning

rules.rule: Loss of massive put wall at major expiry triggers waterfall/cascade event. Immediate risk management.
rules.quote: MASSIVE puts at 6780 for Mar 4-5 expiry. If lost = waterfall/cascade event

rules.rule: Advanced decline line dropping for first time in extended period = early market warning
rules.quote: Advanced decline line went down briefly — first time in a while

rules.rule: DXY making new highs above technical base with record short positions = short squeeze risk. Dollar strength = risk-off for equities.
rules.quote: Dollar made higher high above 9930. If dollar has based, massive short squeeze potential

rules.rule: Sector leadership shift to Energy/Materials/Staples/Defensives = tech risk rising. Overweight defensives accordingly.
rules.quote: 2026 all about energy, materials, staples, and defensives

rules.rule: Rapid expansion of leveraged ETF exposure (2x-3x single stocks) = late cycle signal, systemic risk amplifier
rules.quote: Leveraged ETF exposure expanding massively. Later cycle market signal.

rules.rule: Credit default swaps widening on AI/data center debt (Oracle CDS at 2009 levels) = canary for AI bubble stress. Bonds sniff out problems before stocks.
rules.quote: Oracle CDS back to widest since 2009. Someone believes there's risk around AI.

rules.rule: Rising delinquencies (30-day, 60-day, auto loans, credit cards) = middle class stress. Track trajectory, not absolute level. 30-day rise is the leading signal.
rules.quote: It's the trajectory that's most concerning. 30 days late starting to rise.

rules.rule: When oil/energy hits major resistance after months-long rally AND dark pool profit-taking appears, expect consolidation. Don't chase commodity moves that are already in the news.
rules.quote: We've been talking about oil for 4 months. Wall Street already taking profit at supply zones.

rules.rule: Massive short interest buildup on energy after multi-year highs = short squeeze fuel. Track hedge fund short positioning via Subu Trade data.
rules.quote: Monster spike in short interest as we broke multi-year highs on energy. No wonder the market squeezed.

rules.rule: Healthcare (XLV) breaking new weekly close highs during rangebound market = potential rotation target. Watch for sector momentum.
rules.quote: Healthcare stocks actually broke a new weekly close high.

rules.rule: 100-year corporate bonds (Google) hitting the news = late-cycle excess. Last time a 100-yr bond made news preceded a bond market collapse.
rules.quote: Last time I remember a 100-year bond in the news, it was near the end of the bonds market.

rules.rule: NVDA head and shoulders pattern activates below 170. Massive head = massive measured move down. Loss of 170 = loss of the backbone.
rules.quote: If we drop 170, head and shoulders, and the head is massive in length. Pretty nasty.

rules.rule: BTC needs 72K+ for bull confirmation. Cross-correlate with ETH (2150+), SOL, XRP — all must break simultaneously for conviction.
rules.quote: 72 is the key. You want to see all of them breaking at the same time.

rules.rule: When 20W MA breaks, expect price to test 50W MA. Pattern: drop 20W → rally to 20W → reject → test 50W
rules.quote: When you drop the 20, you go down, you rally up to the 20, then we may see weakness, and then we may hit the 50

rules.rule: When financials are worst sector with massive outflows + private debt stress, expect cockroach effect — more shoes to drop
rules.quote: Where there's one cockroach, there's usually more. $300B private debt starting to look shaky

rules.rule: When everyone is looking at something (record ETF attention), expect consolidation not continuation. Contrarian signal.
rules.quote: When everyone's looking at something, it's usually not as good

rules.rule: Oil-to-gold ratio trend break signals oil catching up to gold — inflation implications. Watch for $100 then $120 oil.
rules.quote: If we break 120, things could get serious on the markets

rules.rule: Already beaten-down assets (software, crypto) can be relative safe havens in broad selloffs — fund flow rotation effect
rules.quote: When you have an asset that's really fallen off a cliff... people can move into it as a partial safe haven

rules.rule: First corporate bond flinch (HYG + LQD dropping together) after a long stable period = major warning signal
rules.quote: First flinch from the bonds market in almost a year — that is a huge deal
